nl_query: Show all closure table entries for the CSE department.
failed_sql: SELECT ac.ancestor_id, ac.descendant_id, ac.depth FROM academic_unit_closure ac JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = ac.descendant_id WHERE au.unit_type = 'COURSE' AND au.ancestor_id = (SELECT id FROM academic_unit WHERE unit_type = 'COURSE' AND code = 'CSE') LIMIT 1000;
